name: Mom's Nut and Date Candy
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Nuts, finely chopped (walnuts, pecans, etc.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil a syrup of the sugar, water and Karo until it reaches the soft ball stage.
2. Remove from heat as soon as the mixture reaches the desired consistency.
3. Let cool completely.
4. Beat in the dates until they "disintegrate," then add the chopped nuts.
5. Wet a dish towel in cold water.
6. Spoon the candy along the middle of the towel in piles.
7. Fold the towel over and roll it, pressing firmly throughout the process.
8. Allow to cool and harden.
9. Slice into approximately 1/4-inch pieces.
10. Optionally, roll slices in coconut or chopped nuts (Mom never did).
